title: Civil Protection and Manhacks
description: In this resource pack replace illagers (except illusioner) to Civil Protection from Half-Life 2 and vex to manhack.
body:
### WARNING! Optifine (or something equal) is required!

In this resource pack replace illagers (except illusioner) to Civil Protection from Half-Life 2 and vex to manhack.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kEuMt92d5JM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Works with fresh animations (but this resource pack should be above it, of course).
